_comment: Strict per-page CSP for the boot screens, hash-derived by tools/csp-hashes.mjs. Served by holo-fhs-sw.js as Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only (observe, do not block) until a browser pass shows zero violations, then promoted to the enforcing header. Regenerate after ANY edit to a listed page (the inline hashes drift).
splash.html: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'sha256-rht6MvGt1e00hWIDwKdb2wwLnMyFvILM2KAmDqwOE6w=' 'sha256-9qWUDQM9cuGcAvCTnK4YvMGeLMoWaejc4ZOx6G5mKWk=' 'sha256-Uc6LDGqDE2BxP/wpYIO1/oPQRh+QXcIJ1DLN+tewTJY='; style-src 'self' 'sha256-2Rt/C/unQhJNMlmfLzkY8eFR5DNlv2HHkcnqMS/SqRk='; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'
login.html: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'sha256-g0nSzigBYvvt4aydQphUS+e7RObK2ETJazqbaH50bzs=' 'sha256-sl5MP0Ae87oUSg1wlTGgN2j4pRn/BsNWUQ8nbgXQIQU=' 'sha256-px3FOK7QRGHwFZC7jbTs6xChrDbsyAygPYBjwhOEPTU='; style-src 'self' 'sha256-j0YuVhpgh9EmcXkogpG3943SXXZylSiYLxEWiLGw5I0='; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'
_shell_comment: shell.html / home-screen.html are the APP PLATFORM, not a controlled boot screen: many inline scripts/handlers + real network reach (RPCs, gateways, peers, governed import fetch). A hash-only script-src is infeasible; the G3 goal is narrower — forbid cross-origin CODE EXECUTION. script-src locks to 'self'+wasm+inline (no https: origin serves a script/module); connect-src stays open (data fetches governed by Law L4, not CSP). Report-Only until a browser pass.
